query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN phone IS NOT NULL AND phone != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_telefone,
  SUM(CASE WHEN hours IS NOT NULL AND hours != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_horario,
  SUM(CASE WHEN rating IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_rating,
  SUM(CASE WHEN lat IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_coordenadas,
  SUM(CASE WHEN instagram IS NOT NULL AND instagram != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_instagram,
  SUM(CASE WHEN reviewCount IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_avaliacoes
FROM establishments;
